text.title: Django Service Layer Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for django-services.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the project have non-trivial business logic reused across views, admin, tasks, or commands?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — fat view is fine at this size
BLOCK — route DB writes through services
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: 10kloc Django + reused logic + standard layering → first two branches do not match → no HTTP imports → ORM only in services → modules by aggregate → all_gates_green=true → APPROVE.
